flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Hazard Community and Technical College are 16% below the public certificate-predominant peer median ($29.9k vs $35.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Hazard Community and Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (7.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Hazard Community and Technical College fell 58% between 2021 and 2024 ($15.2k → $6.4k).
